docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, KAILASH AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ,CEDRIC DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
